description: Style Note The man of style always chooses his trousers with care, and scullers makes it all the easier with this classsy range of chinos. Designed with the choicest of fabrics, they make for perfect semi-formal wear when paired with a classic formal shirt and leather shoes. Product Details Beige chinos, has a flat front, a zipper and button closure, belt loops on the waistband, two pockets on the sides, brand badge appliqued beside the right side pocket and two pockets at the back Material and Care 100% Cotton Hand wash or machine wash cold with like colours Tumble dry low Do not bleach Warm iron Size and Fit Slim Fit The model (height 6' and waist 32&rdquo ) is wearing a size 32
